battleTraits.name: Masters of Destiny
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Battle, Start of the First Battle Round
battleTraits.effect:
Roll 9 dice and put them to one side. These are your destiny dice. During the battle, instead of rolling the dice for 1 of the rolls from the list opposite, you can pick one of your destiny dice and use it as the roll. Once a destiny dice has been used, it is discarded. If you want to replace a roll that uses more than one D6, you must use the same number of destiny dice. Rolls that are replaced count as unmodified rolls and cannot be re-rolled or modified unless noted.

Rolls that can be replaced: Casting, Run, Charge, Hit, Wound, Save (must still modify by Rend).

enhancements.name: Shield of Fate
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 18" of your general, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
enhancements.effect: On a 6+, until the start of your next turn, that unit has WARD (6+). If that unit already has a ward save, add 1 to ward rolls for that unit until the start of your next turn instead.

enhancements.name: Glimpse the Future
enhancements.declare: If you have fewer than 6 destiny dice, make a casting roll of 2D6.
enhancements.effect: On a 7+, you can roll a dice and add it to your destiny dice.

enhancements.name: Daemonheart
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit within 1" of your general.
enhancements.effect: Inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the number of the current battle round.

enhancements.name: Timeslip Pendant
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit within 9" of your general.
enhancements.effect: That unit has STRIKE-LAST this phase.

regimentAbilities.name: Transient Forms
regimentAbilities.effect: Roll a dice each time a friendly Kairic Acolytes model is slain in the combat phase. On a 4+, you can return 1 slain model to a friendly Tzaangors unit within 9" of the slain model.

regimentAbilities.name: Eternal Conflagration
regimentAbilities.effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of ranged weapons used by friendly Flamers of Tzeentch units.

abilities.name: Bolt of Change
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: On a 6+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. If any models are slain by this ability, you can pick a friendly Tzaangors unit wholly within 18" of this unit and return 1 slain model to that Tzaangors unit.

abilities.name: Gestalt Sorcery
abilities.effect: On a 6+, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit's Sorcerous Bolts this phase.

abilities.name: Slashing Fins
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit that any models in this unit passed across this phase to be the target, then roll a dice for each model in this unit that did so.
abilities.effect: For each 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

abilities.name: Long-Planned Strike
abilities.effect: While this unit is wholly within enemy territory, its melee weapons have Crit (2 Hits).

abilities.name: Long-Planned Strike
abilities.effect: While this unit is wholly within enemy territory, its melee weapons have Crit (2 Hits).

abilities.name: Capricious Wyrdflame
abilities.effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by this unit if the target unit has 5 or more models.
